zh.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽
zh.Bucklow, Cheshire, England: 英國爾巴可洛福 希爾
zh.Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, UK: 英國英格蘭爾鄧翰 梅西
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Mainwaring於1163年出生在英國爾鄧翰 梅西時，她的父親Roger de Mainwaring33歲，母親Ellen de Warmingham30歲。她於1180年與Hamon de Massey IV在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1240年在英國爾巴可洛福 希爾享年77歲。

zh-hans.Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, UK: 英国英格兰爾鄧翰 梅西
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Mainwaring于1163年出生在英国爾鄧翰 梅西时，她的父亲Roger de Mainwaring33岁，母亲Ellen de Warmingham30岁。她于1180年与Hamon de Massey IV在英国英格兰林可爾史爾帕茨 本 林賽结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1240年在英国爾巴可洛福 希爾享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Mainwaring was born in 1163, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, her father, Roger de Mainwaring, was 33 and her mother, Ellen de Warmingham, was 30. She married Hamon de Massey IV in 1180, in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1240, in Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Mainwaring est née en 1163, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Mainwaring, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ellen de Warmingham, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Hamon de Massey IV en 1180, à Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1240, à Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Mainwaring 1163 in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Mainwaring 33 und ihre Mutter Ellen de Warmingham 30. Sie hat 1180 in Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Hamon de Massey IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1240 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Mainwaringが1163年にイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで生まれた時，父Roger de Mainwaringは33歳，母Ellen de Warminghamは30歳であった。1180年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアパーツ オフ リンドセイでHamon de Massey IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1240年にイギリスチェシュアイアブックロウ ヒルで77歳で死去した。

ko.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지
ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Mainwaring(이)가 1163년 영국 체실르 던함 마시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Mainwaring(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen de Warmingham(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 파르츠 프 린지에서 Hamon de Massey IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 영국 체실르 벅로 힐에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Hamon de Massey IV em 1180, em Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.Lindsey, Lincolnshire, England: парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Mainwaring родилась в 1163 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Mainwaring было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen de Warmingham, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hamon de Massey IV в 1180 г. в местности парц оф линдси, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1240 г. в местности букклоу хилл, чешир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.

Se casó con Hamon de Massey IV en 1180, en Parts of Lindsey, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas.
